Solo production

One person, five stages, daily output

No writers' room, no editors, no VAs — every stage of the pipeline built and run solo from a zero-prior-experience start.

01
Script
Original short-form story concepts, written for a 45–90 second emotional arc.
02
Generate
AI image generation for consistent characters and scenes across every frame.
03
Voice
TTS voice synthesis tuned for Telugu narration and pacing.
04
Edit
Full video assembly — timing, captions, sound design — solo, end to end.
05
Publish
Consistent daily upload cadence and audience engagement strategy.
Capstone project

Aradhya — AI Influencer World Tour

A fully autonomous AI-generated persona with a consistent visual identity, placed across seven world landmarks — built as the capstone project for the 100xEngineers cohort.

Fully autonomous AI-generated persona

Built a complete AI Influencer — a persistent character with consistent visual identity, scripted content, and a synthetic voice — using structured prompt frameworks to hold identity, wardrobe, and lighting steady across every scene.
